title: heterophyllium helveticum
intro: Heterophyllium helveticum, also known as the Alpine Fork Moss, is a species of moss belonging to the family Sematophyllaceae. This plant is primarily found in the alpine regions of Europe and is valued for its medicinal properties. The Alpine Fork Moss has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to ease congestion and reduce inflammation. Additionally, it has been used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, which may provide relief from coughs, colds, and other respiratory ailments when consumed as a decoction.
